description: Bun defaults to <cwd>/.bun/install/cache. Inside a burrow workspace (the git-tracked project clone), a broad 'git add .' sweeps ~5k cache files into the commit, causing GitHub 422 on PR open.
resolution: Always inject BUN_INSTALL_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/bun-install-cache via composeRunEnv() in src/runs/spawn/dispatch.ts. /tmp is bwrap private tmpfs — writable, ephemeral, invisible to git. env dict is now always non-null.
